name: 100Pcs clear 260 Balloons Clear Long Skinny Latex Balloon for Animal Ballons, Premium Quality Balloons for Beginners Baloons Making Kid's Carnivals Party Decoartion
bullets: 100 transparent long balloons to make fun balloon animals, sculptures, and decorations
Perfect for twisting into animals, flowers, swords, hats, and more at kids' parties, carnivals, magic shows
Durable premium latex balloons in assorted colors for modeling balloon art and decorating events
Easy to inflate with a balloon pump; leave space and release air to avoid popping
Develop children's creativity and motor skills with these fun long balloons for modeling balloon animals

reviews.name: NewYorkCityNikki
reviews.title: Perfect base balloons for arches – durable and great value
reviews.body: I use these regularly as the structural base for balloon arches through my event design company, NYCN Designs, and they work really well for that purpose.The white color is perfect because it blends seamlessly into designs, especially when layering other colors on top. They’re durable during inflation and installation, which is key when building out larger structures.For the price, these are a…

reviews.name: Jody dozier
reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: I recently picked up these 260 balloons for twisting, and they worked out great. The size is perfect for making balloon animals—long enough to get creative but still easy to handle, even for beginners.The balloons feel strong and flexible, which is super important when you’re twisting. I was able to make dogs, swords, and more without a bunch of them popping. Of course, you’ll get an occasional…

reviews.name: sucketta bryce
reviews.title: Value for money and it works great.
reviews.body: ★★★★★ Great Product!I'm very happy with this purchase. The product arrived on time, was exactly as described, and met my expectations. The quality is excellent, it's easy to use, and it works as intended. I appreciate the value for the price and would definitely purchase it again. I highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a reliable and well-made item.

reviews.name: Donisha G.
reviews.title: Great rubberband/Quality balloon
reviews.body: These are one of my most used items. I've used them for enhancing decorations but they also make for great Rubbermaid when working with larger projects. They provide so much stretch and durability.
